blended.narrative: Mont Orford is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 105 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tuesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 56°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
